notes: Legacy Windows launchers moved into scripts/windows/
Tauri generated schemas and build caches removed from the source tree
Diagnostics schedule lookup optimized through schtasks with PowerShell fallback
Worker schedule starter fixed to use the project root
Worker reuses the logged-in Chromium context instead of opening TikTok twice
Worker self-test and maintenance actions added to the desktop app
Pinned auto-refresh control, TikTok Heart branding, and run history panel added
Desktop shell renamed to app_shell and UI dark background mode added
Pytest runtime isolated from the real profile and logs
